resultList.dtldesc: Indulge in luxurious city living with our exquisite 3 BHK Flat which is available for sale in the vibrant city of Bangalore, Karnataka. This meticulously crafted residence offers a perfect blend of modern design, spacious interiors, and breathtaking views, providing an unparalleled living experience. Blessed with excellent connectivity and a thriving business ecosystem, Bangalore is the ideal city to flourish personally and professionally. Contact us today for a viewing and secure your slice of Bangalores cosmopolitan charm.Property Specifications Constructed meticulously over the carpet area of 1973 sq ft, this flat situated on the 2nd floor of an impressive 8-story building offers you an unfurnished ambience, hence you can customize it according to your unique taste and style. With a south-facing orientation, the flat enjoys ample sunlight and a soothing ambience. The vitrified flooring exudes elegance throughout, complementing the contemporary design. The meticulously designed space encompasses 3 bedrooms, each accompanied by an attached western-style bathroom for utmost convenience. Four balconies grace the flat, offering serene views of the driveway and inviting abundant natural light. Here, one balcony is linked to the living room and the other 3 balconies are open from the 3 bedrooms. There is also a living cum dining area that provides a seamless flow for entertaining and relaxation. The normal kitchen comes equipped with a piped gas connection, while a utility area adds to the practicality. Facilities This exceptional flat offers a range of top-notch facilities for a comfortable and secure living experience and includes covered parking ensuring the safety of your vehicle, while a 24-hour water supply guarantees uninterrupted convenience. The 100 power backup facility provides peace of mind during occasional outages. A dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance ensure round-the-clock safety and peace of mind. The building features two lifts for hassle-free vertical transportation.Locality Nestled in a sought-after locality, this flat offers proximity to a plethora of amenities. Renowned schools are in close vicinity, ensuring quality education options for your children. Hospitals are conveniently located within 500 meters, providing quick access to healthcare facilities. A mall is just 150 meters away, offering a range of shopping and entertainment choices. Public transport in the form of buses and autos is easily accessible, facilitating convenient commuting. The metro station is a mere 2 kilometers away, enhancing connectivity to different parts of the city. Banks and ATMs are nearby, catering to your financial needs.

It comprises 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, including 2 attached bathrooms and 1 common bathroom, all designed in a modern western style. The presence of a security guard and CCTV cameras provides round-the-clock security and peace of mind.The building is equipped with 2 lifts for easy access to your floor. The flat is complemented by a range of amenities, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable lifestyle. resultList.dtldesc: Presenting an expansive 5 BHK flat available for sale in the prestigious Hoysala Infantry Towers, located in the desirable neighbourhood of Sanjayanagara, Bangalore. This remarkable property offers generous living spaces, modern amenities, and a prime location, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a luxurious and comfortable home.::::::::::::Property Specifications::::::::::::Spanning across an impressive carpet area of 5000 sqft, this 5 BHK flat provides abundant space for a variety of living requirements. The property is vaastu compliant and faces the North-East direction, ensuring positive energy flow and auspiciousness. Situated on the ground floor of a magnificent 21-storey tower, this residence offers ease of access and convenience.::::::::::::The plus point is, the flat is unfurnished, providing the opportunity for personalized customization and interior design to suit individual preferences. The flat comprises five well-appointed bedrooms, each equipped with a western-style attached bathroom complete with geysers. These ensuite bathrooms ensure privacy and convenience for each occupant.::::::::::::Adding to the appeal of this property, there are four balconies attached to all the rooms, allowing residents to enjoy fresh air and breathtaking views. The living cum dining area offers a spacious and versatile layout, providing an ideal setting for social gatherings and relaxation. Additionally, a dedicated pooja room is available, catering to spiritual needs and enhancing the overall tranquillity of the space.::::::::::::The open kitchen is designed for functionality and is equipped with a piped gas connection, allowing for hassle-free cooking experiences. A utility area is attached to the kitchen, offering convenience for storage and handling household chores.::::::::::::The flooring of the flat is adorned with elegant vitrified tiles, adding a touch of sophistication and easy maintenance to the interior.::::::::::::Facilities::::::::::::Vehicles can be parked at ease in the open parking space available here. The property is also supported by facilities such as a 24-hour water supply and power backup. For the convenience of the residents; 2 lifts are provided and for safety day in and day out; security guards are appointed and CCTV cameras are installed.::::::::::::Locality::::::::::::Sanjayanagara is one of the sought-after residential areas having good connectivity with the prime areas of the city. Also, the locality covers major social and retail amenities such as schools, hospitals, shopping centres, banks, ATMs, etc. Public and private transports provide regular service to and from this area. On the whole; considering this property to reside with your beloved family is certainly worth it.
